meta.title: Rewards | AI Game Connect
meta.description: Preview future AI Game Connect rewards, including badges, venue discounts, partner offers, leaderboard recognition, and seasonal rewards.

hero.title: Compete, rank, and unlock rewards.
hero.body: Future rewards will connect real-life participation, leaderboard movement, badges, and partner offers in a safe approved-place ecosystem.

sections.title: From joining to getting notified.
sections.body: The preview shows a future reward path without activating rewards today.

items.title: Join
items.body: Register as an early player or venue partner.

items.title: Build activity
items.body: Participate in approved real-life games and competitions.

items.title: Move on leaderboards
items.body: Follow ranking movement after verified play.

items.title: Unlock badges
items.body: Earn future recognition for activity and fair play.

items.title: Get notified via Dawrak
items.body: Receive reward updates when the assistant launches.

sections.title: Rewards that can grow with the network.
sections.body: Every reward type is future-facing and depends on approved partners and verified activity.

items.title: Venue discounts
items.body: Future discounts from approved places.

items.title: Tournament prizes
items.body: Recognition or prizes for verified competitions.

items.title: Partner offers
items.body: Future offers from trusted partners.

items.title: Player badges
items.body: Recognition for activity, fair play, and consistency.

items.title: Leaderboard recognition
items.body: Highlighting progress and verified competition.

items.title: Seasonal rewards
items.body: Future campaigns as the community grows.

sections.title: Badges can make progress visible.
sections.body: The badge system is a preview concept, not a live profile feature yet.

items.title: Fair Play
items.body: For players who respect clear rules.

items.title: Consistent Player
items.body: For steady approved participation.

items.title: Tournament Ready
items.body: For future competition participation.

items.title: Community Builder
items.body: For helping healthy play grow.

sections.title: Rewards should help approved places grow too.
sections.body: Venue partners can use future rewards to bring players back in organized ways.

items.title: Discount campaigns
items.body: Future offers tied to verified participation.

items.title: Event rewards
items.body: Rewards connected to approved competitions.

items.title: Venue spotlight
items.body: Recognition inside the ecosystem when available.

sections.title: Rewards can recognize progress, not just winning.
sections.body: Future rewards may reflect verified movement, consistency, fair play, and tournament participation.

items.title: Rank movement
items.body: Recognition for meaningful progress.

items.title: Top placements
items.body: Future recognition for strong verified performance.

items.title: Streaks
items.body: Future recognition for consistent approved activity.

sections.title: Rewards will launch gradually.
sections.body: Rewards will launch gradually as the player and venue network grows. Founding members get early access and bonus recognition. Register now to receive updates.

sections.title: Register now for reward updates.
sections.body: Choose player or venue registration and tell us what reward updates you want to receive.

sections.title: Rewards questions.
sections.body: Clear answers about what is coming later.
